description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian with a lean, athletic build, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. The figure wears loose, cropped pants, a sleeveless top, and a large utility belt with pouches and a rolled-up mat or blanket attached at the back. The person has a distinctive spiked hairstyle and is adorned with arm and leg bands, as well as fingerless gloves. Accessories include a dagger strapped to the side and a set of small, urban-themed props nearby: a bowl with chopsticks, a wooden stump, and a sheathed blade. The overall appearance suggests a streetwise, agile character, possibly inspired by urban survival or adventure themes.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with a spiked hairstyle, utility belt, and urban adventurer attire, standing upright with accessories and props.
description_view_0: Front view showing the person's face, spiked hair, sleeveless top, utility belt, and all accessories clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the spiked hair, the rolled mat on the belt, and the dagger at the hip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the rolled mat, and the full utility belt with pouches.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm bands, side profile of the face, and the dagger's position.
attribute_clothing_type: urban adventurer outfit with sleeveless top, loose cropped pants, utility belt, arm and leg bands, and fingerless gloves
